about.metaDescription: Metehan Ulusoy — Computer Engineering student building AI, automation, and full-stack projects.
about.title: Hi, I'm Metehan.
about.tagline: A Computer Engineering student who learns by building — AI systems, automation, and the web around them.
bio: I'm a second-year Computer Engineering student in Turkey. I got into software because I wanted to build things I'd actually use — and the fastest way to learn how something works is to try to ship it. So far that's meant 20+ projects, public and private.

Most of my energy goes into AI and automation: finance ML (credit risk, fraud detection), retrieval pipelines (RAG), LLM infrastructure (cost routing, eval gates, semantic caching), and automation bots with real notifications. I've also shipped a commercial automation product on Gumroad, and on the web side I build full-stack apps with Next.js and Supabase. I like the unglamorous parts — measuring quality, cutting cost, making things reproducible.

Right now I'm on the software team for a Teknofest 2026 project and looking for a summer internship in backend, AI engineering, or FinTech — somewhere I can learn from people who ship serious software.

timeline.title: Recep Tayyip Erdoğan University
timeline.note: Coursework I did well in: Computer Networks (AA), Differential Equations (AA), Linear Algebra (AA), Data Structures, OOP, Databases, Operating Systems.

timeline.title: Adana Alparslan Türkeş Science & Technology University
